hawkish_phrases: Monetary policy will need to continue to remain restrictive for sufficiently long until the risks to inflation returning sustainably to the 2% target in the medium term have dissipated further
Services consumer price inflation remained elevated at 5.6% in August
monetary policy would have to remain tighter for longer
squeeze persistent inflationary pressures out of the system
The Committee continues to monitor closely the risks of inflation persistence
dovish_phrases: In the absence of material developments, a gradual approach to removing policy restraint remains appropriate
Households' inflation expectations had largely normalised to close to their historical averages
Annual private sector regular average weekly earnings growth had eased to 4.9%
Twelve-month CPI inflation had been 2.2% in August
Indicators of households' inflation expectations had largely normalised
summary: The MPC voted 8-1 to hold Bank Rate at 5%, with one member preferring a 25bp cut, while maintaining restrictive policy guidance that a gradual approach to removing restraint remains appropriate in the absence of material developments.
